error.signature: cv2.error: OpenCV was built without CUDA support; cv2.cuda is not available

verdict.summary: OpenCV cv2.cuda module is not available because the installed build was compiled without CUDA support.

dead_ends.action: pip install opencv-contrib-python expecting CUDA support
dead_ends.why_fails: PyPI wheels are not built with CUDA. Even opencv-contrib-python from pip has no CUDA.

dead_ends.action: Install CUDA toolkit after opencv-python hoping it activates CUDA
dead_ends.why_fails: OpenCV must be compiled with CUDA at build time. Installing CUDA later has no effect on existing OpenCV.

workarounds.action: Build OpenCV from source with CUDA enabled

workarounds.how: conda install -c conda-forge opencv  # some conda builds include CUDA

workarounds.action: Use CPU equivalents of CUDA functions for portability
workarounds.how: # Instead of cv2.cuda.GpuMat, use regular cv2.Mat operations which run on CPU
